title: TrailCurrent Playbill — settings
description: Single source of truth for app-level settings. Auto-rendered into the Settings UI by the GUI. Connection credentials live in connection.schema.json (separate file, separate disk file) because they contain a secret.

device.description: Per-instance identity. A rig can have several Playbills (living room, bedroom, ...); each gets a stable id used in MQTT topics and a friendly name shown to users.

id.description: Stable lowercase slug used as a topic segment. Auto-generated on first run from hostname; never changes after first run so existing subscriptions keep working. Reserved value 'all' is forbidden — that's the broadcast target.

name.description: User-friendly display name shown in PWAs and on the Now Playing chrome. Editable any time.

canInstance.description: Which CAN address block this Playbill claims (0 → 0x100-0x10F, 1 → 0x110-0x11F, 2 → 0x120-0x12F). null = MQTT-only; this Playbill ignores the CAN bridge. See docs/app/dbc-additions.md.

theme.description: auto follows the GNOME system preference

idleTimeoutSeconds.description: Seconds of remote/keyboard inactivity before showing the screensaver. 0 disables.

resumeLastSessionOnLaunch.description: On GUI launch, restore the last visited screen and selection.

dvbAdapterIndex.description: Preferred /dev/dvb/adapterN. null lets the controller auto-pick.

rtlSdrAdapterIndex.description: Preferred RTL-SDR device index. null lets the controller auto-pick.
